concerns.text: FR-001 mandates downloading 'ds000115'. The tasks (T004, T012) and plan explicitly target 'ds000246'. There is no task covering the spec's requirement to download ds000115, creating a coverage gap where the implementer cannot satisfy the spec as written.

FR-004 requires a 'Group-Level paired-sample t-test'. The tasks (T021) and plan implement a 'one-sample t-test against zero'. No task exists to implement the paired-sample t-test required by the spec, leaving the spec requirement uncovered.

SC-002 sets a success criterion that 'At least one brain cluster survives FDR'. The tasks (T024) and plan handle the 'null result' case as a valid outcome. There is no task to enforce or validate the specific 'cluster survival' success criterion defined in the spec, creating a mismatch in success validation.

SC-003 requires a specific correlation threshold ('r ≥ 0.3 with p < 0.05') as a success criterion. The tasks (T030) only calculate the correlation. No task exists to validate or enforce this specific threshold as a pass/fail condition for the project.
SC-004 requires effect size (Cohen's d) ≥ 0.5. While T023 calculates Cohen's d, there is no task to validate or enforce the '≥ 0.5' threshold as a success criterion defined in the spec.

Task T004 is tagged with '[FR-001]' but implements the download of 'ds000246', whereas FR-001 in the spec explicitly requires 'ds000115'. This is a stale tag referencing a requirement that the task does not actually satisfy (due to the dataset mismatch).

Task T021 implements a 'one-sample t-test' but is not tagged with any FR/SC. It contradicts FR-004 (paired-sample) and covers the plan's correction, but lacks a tag linking it to the corrected logic or the plan's specific phase requirement.
